taskCaption: item ends up inside the drawer (terminal-relation-only diagnostic)

pilotMetadata.tests: Asserts, via the FROZEN matcher, ONLY that the item's TERMINAL relation to the container volume is INSIDE (one hard OBJECT_RELATION_GOAL -> goal_satisfaction). It does NOT require an initial NEAR state, a NEAR->INSIDE transition, a CONTAINMENT_CHANGE event, contact, gripper, or temporal order. The RLBench analogue of the RH20T/real-camera terminal-only target: it answers 'did the item end inside the drawer?' and nothing more.
pilotMetadata.enforcedVsAuthoring: ENFORCED: terminal INSIDE(item,container) only (goal_satisfaction reads the robot's terminal relation in csg.matcher._goal_satisfaction_distance). AUTHORING ONLY (not verifier-enforced): geometry source/category, confidences, the representative object sizes (the live container volume is bound per-rollout from the PutItemInDrawer success proximity sensor bounding box). A 'born-inside' episode (item inside the whole time, but it MOVES so the extractor reports a terminal INSIDE) PASSes this target -- which is exactly why the strictly-stronger object_inside_container_relation_event target exists.
pilotMetadata.deferredNote: This target deliberately asserts the weakest honest claim (terminal containment) so the relation-event target can be shown strictly stronger. Contact/causal-order semantics are deferred until honestly evidenced without weakening leakage discipline.
pilotMetadata.source: RLBench PutItemInDrawer (bottom/middle/top variations); external simulation leg of the object_inside_container flagship task. Live demos recorded on Runpod/CoppeliaSim by pilots.rlbench.record_put_item_in_drawer; raw sim dumps stay off git. Object sizes here are representative; the container volume in each rollout is the success proximity sensor's bounding box.
pilotMetadata.notAGoldTask: Pilot diagnostic, deliberately NOT added to gold_tests/. Read it for terminal-containment mappability from an external simulator, not as a full object_inside_container acceptance test. It asserts relation evidence only and does not assert contact causality.
